topic: Ivory Coast 1-0 Ecuador, WC 2026 Group E (Philadelphia) — Ecuador hit the woodwork twice and dominated, but Amad Diallo's 89th-minute finish off a Wilfried Singo cutback stole it for the Elephants, who leap level with Germany on points
subject: amad-diallo

youtube_title: Amad Diallo's 89th-Minute Dagger Stuns Ecuador | Ivory Coast 1-0 | World Cup 2026
youtube_description: Ivory Coast 1-0 Ecuador, FIFA World Cup 2026 Group E in Philadelphia. Ecuador hit the woodwork twice and dominated, but Amad Diallo's 89th-minute finish off a Wilfried Singo cutback won it for the Elephants — who jump level with Germany on points. Robbery, or did Ivory Coast earn it? Subscribe for your daily World Cup story.
instagram_caption: 89 minutes of nothing. Then Amad Diallo. Ecuador hit the bar TWICE and lost — daylight robbery, or did the Elephants just want it more? Tell me who's escaping Group E 🐘 #worldcup2026
tiktok_caption: Ecuador hit the woodwork twice and STILL lost 😳 Amad Diallo, 89th minute. Robbery or deserved? Who's escaping Group E? 🐘
